test-method.name: tc_auth_001_loginTokenPresent
test-method.description: Verify admin login token is available

test-method.name: tc_auth_002_loginLiveCall
test-method.description: POST /auth/login with real admin credentials

test-method.name: tc_auth_003_loginAsHrManager
test-method.description: Login as HR Manager (sarah.hr@rivio.com)

exception.message: Unexpected HTTP status. Body: {"success":false,"message":"Invalid email or password","timestamp":"2026-05-09T15:02:00.727755103"} expected [200] but found [401]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected HTTP status. Body: {"success":false,"message":"Invalid email or password","timestamp":"2026-05-09T15:02:00.727755103"} expected [200] but found [401] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1419) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:1383) at com.rivio.utils.AssertionUtils.assertSuccess(AssertionUtils.java:19) at com.rivio.utils.AssertionUtils.assertSuccess(AssertionUtils.java:15) at com.rivio.tests.TC01_AuthTest.tc_auth_003_loginAsHrManager(TC01_AuthTest.java:81) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:819) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:619) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:443) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:437) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:397) at test-method.name: tc_auth_004_loginInvalidCredentials
test-method.description: Login with wrong password → 401

test-method.name: tc_auth_005_createUser
test-method.description: Create a new user with roleId=4 (Employee)

test-method.name: tc_auth_006_getAllUsers
test-method.description: Get all users (paginated)

test-method.name: tc_auth_007_resetPassword
test-method.description: Reset password for newly created user

test-method.name: tc_auth_008_deleteUser
test-method.description: Delete the created test user

test-method.name: tc_role_001_getAllPermissions
test-method.description: Get all permissions — expect 5 seeded records

test-method.name: tc_role_002_getAllRoles
test-method.description: Get all roles — expect 4 seeded roles

test-method.name: tc_role_003_getRoleById
test-method.description: Get role by ID — Super Admin (id=1)

test-method.name: tc_role_004_createRole
test-method.description: Create a new custom role

test-method.name: tc_role_005_updateRole
test-method.description: Update the created role name

test-method.name: tc_role_006_getPermissionsForRole
test-method.description: Get permissions for HR Manager (role id=2)

test-method.name: tc_role_007_bindPermissionsToRole
test-method.description: Bind permissions 2,5 (APPROVE_LEAVE + VIEW_PROFILE) to created role

test-method.name: tc_cs_001_getAllLocations
test-method.description: Get all locations — expect 3 seeded

test-method.name: tc_cs_002_createLocation
test-method.description: Create a new location — Chennai Office

test-method.name: tc_cs_003_updateLocation
test-method.description: Update Chennai Office → Pune Office

test-method.name: tc_cs_004_getAllDepartments
test-method.description: Get all departments — expect 3 seeded

test-method.name: tc_cs_005_createDepartment
test-method.description: Create a new QA department (manager=userId 1)

test-method.name: tc_cs_006_updateDepartment
test-method.description: Update QA Department name

test-method.name: tc_cs_007_getAllDesignations
test-method.description: Get all designations — expect 5 seeded

test-method.name: tc_leave_001_getAllLeaveTypes
test-method.description: Get all leave types — expect 3 seeded

test-method.description: Create a new leave type — Paternity Leave

test-method.name: tc_leave_003_updateLeaveType
test-method.description: Update Paternity Leave → 7 days allotment

test-method.name: tc_leave_004_allocateBalances
test-method.description: Allocate leave balances for 2026

test-method.name: tc_leave_005_getAliceLeaveBalances
test-method.description: Get leave balances for Alice Smith (empProfile id=3)

test-method.name: tc_leave_006_getAliceLeaveHistory

test-method.name: tc_leave_007_applyForLeave
test-method.description: Apply for Sick Leave — John Doe (empProfile 1) for next week

test-method.name: tc_leave_008_approveLeave
test-method.description: Approve John Doe's leave request

test-method.name: tc_leave_009_withdrawLeave
test-method.description: Apply and then withdraw a Casual Leave request

test-method.name: tc_leave_010_deleteLeaveType
test-method.description: Delete the Paternity Leave type (cleanup; tolerated if balances exist)

test-method.name: tc_att_001_getOrgAttendanceSeededDate
test-method.description: Get org-wide attendance for 2026-01-02 (seeded PRESENT day)

test-method.name: tc_att_002_getOrgAttendanceToday
test-method.description: Get org-wide attendance for today

test-method.name: tc_att_003_getEmployeeAttendanceHistory
test-method.description: Get attendance history for John Doe (empProfile 1) in Jan 2026

test-method.name: tc_att_004_manualPunchIn
test-method.description: Manual punch-in for John Doe (empProfile=1) today

test-method.name: tc_att_005_manualPunchOut
test-method.description: Punch out for today's attendance record

test-method.name: tc_att_006_downloadCsvTemplate
test-method.description: Download bulk attendance CSV template

test-method.name: tc_att_007_getAllWorkDays
test-method.description: Get work days — expect 7 seeded (Mon-Sun)

test-method.name: tc_att_008_updateWorkDay
test-method.description: Toggle Saturday (id=6) as a working day

test-method.name: tc_att_009_getAllHolidays
test-method.description: Get holidays — expect 3 seeded (New Year, Republic Day, Labour Day)

test-method.name: tc_pay_003_createSalaryComponent
test-method.description: Add a Transport Allowance to Alice (empProfile 3)

test-method.name: tc_pay_004_updateSalaryComponent
test-method.description: Update Transport Allowance value to 6000

test-method.name: tc_pay_005_deleteSalaryComponent
test-method.description: Delete the Transport Allowance component

test-method.name: tc_pay_006_listPayCycles
test-method.description: List all pay cycles — expect 2 seeded (Feb + Mar 2026)

test-method.name: tc_pay_007_searchPayCycles
test-method.description: Search pay cycles by name 'February'

test-method.name: tc_pay_008_createPayCycle
test-method.description: Create a future pay cycle (date-unique per run)

test-method.name: tc_pay_009_getPayslipsForSeededCycle
test-method.description: Get payslips for seeded pay cycle id=1 (Feb 2026, PAID)

exception.message: Feb 2026 cycle should have 2 seeded payslips expected [true] but found [false]

test-method.name: tc_pay_010_generateAndFinalizePayCycle
test-method.description: Generate payslips then finalize April 2026 pay cycle

test-method.name: tc_dash_001_adminSummary
test-method.description: Get admin dashboard summary — validate against seeded data

test-method.name: tc_dash_002_healthCheck
test-method.description: System health check — public endpoint, no auth needed
